text:
The 2024 Paris Summer Olympics are officially underway as the best athletes in the world congregate in France looking to make their mark on Olympic history.

Twenty-six total Team USA athletes fromGeorgiawill compete in the Olympics and Paralympics.

For most of these athletes, spending time at aGeorgia high schoolwas a part of their hard-fought journey to the 2024 Paris Olympics.

Here are the former Georgia high school athletes competing in the 2024 Paris Summer Olympics.

The 2024 Paralympics will take place August 28 through September 8 in Paris.

Below are the five Team USA athletes representing Georgia in Paris this year:

*McKenzie Coan was home-schooled but competed as part of the Cumming Waves Swim Team in Georgia.

**Ryan Medrano is from Savannah but went to high school in Arizona.

You can find more of the latest Olympic coverage onSBLive.

To get live updates on your phone - as well as follow your favorite Georgia high school teams and top games - you can download the SBLive Sports app:

Sam Brown covers high school sports as well as NCAA football and basketball. Sam began his professional career as a high school sports reporter for The Tennessean in Nashville where he covered boys and girls prep sports full-time and helped cover Vanderbilt football, Tennessee Titans football and Nashville Predators hockey. He graduated from Middle Tennessee State University with a double major in journalism and communication studies and currently lives in Seattle with his girlfriend and dog. Â

title: Georgia high school athletes competing in 2024 Paris Olympic Games
description: Meet the 21 Olympians and five Paralympians from Georgia in the 2024 Summer Olympics
